meaning: adj.涓嶈鐪熺殑,鏃犵粍缁囩殑,鏃犳晥鑳界殑
examples: Of all the lazy, indifferent, unbusinesslike attitudes to have!
One of the misfortunes which always pursues the unbusinesslike is that, while they are as easy to read as an open book, they never learn to read the character of others.
"The mayor has dealt with this in a very unbusinesslike fashion, " he said.
